---
title: "scATACseq_R_GeneActivity.Rmd"
author: "Laëtitia"
date: "24/08/2022"
subtitle: "Last modification : `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: "hide"
    toc: true
    toc_float: false
    theme: journal
---

```{r, Setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)

```

```{r, Dependencies, warning=F, message=F}

library(Seurat)
library(Signac)
library(knitr)

```

```{r, Working directories and external script}

directory = str_extract(string = getwd(), pattern = "[:graph:]+(?=bin)")
start_time = Sys.time()

# Create a unique folder for output corresponding to the date of the day
current_date = format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d")
dir.create(path = paste0(directory,"exp/","scATACseq_R_GeneActivity/"))
dir.create(path = paste0(directory,"exp/","scATACseq_R_GeneActivity/", current_date))
directory_output = paste0(directory,"exp/","scATACseq_R_GeneActivity/", current_date, "/")

# Load external script with functions and constants
source(file = paste0(directory, "bin/", "functions_constants.R"))

# Lists of interesting genes
list_genes_TH_hemato = c('SMAD6', 'GATA1', 'GATA2', 'RUNX1', 'TAL1', 'HHEX', 'ZFPM1', 'FLI1', 'CBFA2T3', 'SPI1', 'ERG')
list_genes_metabo_tca = c('ACLY', 'ACSS1', 'IDH1', ' MDH1', 'MDH2', 'PDHA1', 'PDHA2', 'PDK1')
list_genes_metabo_glycolysis = c('G6PD', ' HK1', 'HK2', 'HK3', 'LDHA', 'LDHB', 'PKM', 'GLUT1', 'SLC1A5')
list_genes_metabo_glut = c('GLS', 'SLC1A5', 'ASCT2')
list_genes_metabo = c('ACACA', 'BCAT1', 'FASN',  'GOT1', 'GPAT1', 'MTOR')
  
```

```{r, Input loading}

dir = pic_last_dir(paste0(directory, "exp/", "scATACseq_R_NormalizationReduction/"))
seurat_obj = readRDS(paste0(dir, "/", "seurat_common_merged_qc_normalized_reduced.rds"))

```

```{r, Gene activity matrix}

# Création de la gene activity matrix stockée dans une variable
gene.activities <- GeneActivity(seurat_obj)

# Visualisation des 5 premières lignes et colonnes de la gene activity matrix
as.matrix(gene.activities[1:5, 1:5])

# Ajout de la matrice dans l'objet seurat
seurat_obj[['RNA']] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = gene.activities)

# Normalisation des données
seurat_obj <- NormalizeData(
  object = seurat_obj,
  assay = 'RNA',
  normalization.method = 'LogNormalize',
  scale.factor = median(seurat_obj$nCount_RNA)
)

```

```{r, Gene activity plot, results = 'hold', fig.width=16, fig.height=12}

DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- 'RNA'

# Visualiser l'expression de gènes particuliers
plot = FeaturePlot(
  object = seurat_obj,
  features = list_genes_TF,
  pt.size = 0.1,
  max.cutoff = 'q95',
  ncol = 3,
  cols = c('#1873CC','#1798E5','#00BFFF','#4AC596','#00CC00','#A2E700','#FFFF00','#FFD200','#FFA500')
)
plot


# Visualiser l'expression des gènes les plus variables entre les cellules
seurat_obj <- FindVariableFeatures(object = seurat_obj, assay = 'RNA', nfeatures = 100)

plot_varfeature = FeaturePlot(
  object = seurat_obj,
  features = seurat_obj[['RNA']]@var.features[1:10],
  pt.size = 0.1,
  max.cutoff = 'q95',
  ncol = 3
)
plot_varfeature

```

```{r, Save}

ggsave(plot = plot_varfeature, 
       filename = paste0(directory_exp, "plot_varfeature.png"), 
       width = 18, height = 16)

ggsave(plot = plot, 
       filename = paste0(directory_exp,"plot_gene_list.png"), 
       width = 18, height = 20)

saveRDS(object = seurat_obj, file = paste0(directory_exp, "seurat_obj_annot_qc_normalize_geneact.rds"))

```

```{r, Rsession}

end_time = Sys.time()
cat("Total execution time : ", as.numeric (end_time - start_time, units = "mins"), "minutes")

# Clean working space and memory 
rm(list = ls())
gc()

# Show package version
sessionInfo()

```
